name: Special D.
description:
'''Dennis Horstmann''' (born 16 September 1980), known as '''Special D.''', is a German DJ and [[dance music]]ian who was particularly popular in the Netherlands, where he won the Best Dance International award at the 2004 [[The Music Factory|TMF NL]] awards. He was also popular among the [[Eurodance]] scene in North America. The "D" in Special D comes from the DJ's first name, Dennis.

His best-known track, "Come with Me", reached number 6 on the [[UK Singles Chart]] and number 4 on the [[Irish Singles Chart]] in April 2004. He proceeded making more tracks, such as "[[You (Special D. song)|You]]" and "Here I Am", which were frequently played on European [[Illuminated dance floor|dance floor]]s.

His music featured in ''[[Crank: High Voltage]]''.

He has started using [[Ableton Live]] in his live sets.
